page_title: The 10 Best Happy Hours in San Antonio Right Now

restaurants.name: Pink Shark
restaurants.image_alt: Restaurant interior with window, peach velvet curtains, arched mirror, and orange banquette.
restaurants.blurb: 99-cent oysters every day of the week, 3 to 6pm. Plus a five-hour 'SHARK HOUR' running 3 to 8pm with discounted drinks. There is no other San Antonio oyster deal that hits this hard, and the 4.6 rating tells you the kitchen is keeping up.

items: Discounted Shark Hour cocktail and beer menu

deals.details: .99 Cent Oysters
SHARK HOUR

restaurants.name: I-10 Icehouse
restaurants.image_alt: Golden beer with white foam in a frosted glass mug on black.
restaurants.blurb: True Texas icehouse pricing: $2.54 wells, $2.54 domestic bottles, $3 imports. Mon to Thu 3 to 8pm at the Console Drive institution. Friday through Sunday the same prices start at 11am. Mondays add $2.77 Lone Stars and $3.93 Crown all night.

items: Same icehouse pricing, all afternoon weekend

restaurants.name: Double Standard
restaurants.image_alt: Iced amber cocktail in rocks glass with elaborate orange peel garnish.
restaurants.blurb: Seven days a week, 11:30am to 6pm: $2 select draft beers, $4 double well drinks, $7 select cocktails, $1.50 Texas oysters. The Houston Street bar that puts a credible oyster happy hour in the middle of downtown.

deals.details:
$2 Select Draft Beers
$4 Double Well Drinks
$7 Select Cocktails
$1.50 Texas Oysters

restaurants.name: Down on Grayson
restaurants.image_alt: Night view of Down On Grayson restaurant with bright neon sign and patio.
restaurants.deal_headline: $5 Frozens, Half-Off Apps & $8 Spicy Margs, Mon-Fri 3-6pm
restaurants.blurb: $5 frozens, $6 draft beer and wells, $8 spicy margaritas, $6 select wines, plus half-off appetizers. Mon to Fri 3 to 6pm at the Pearl District patio that has 4,800 reviews and somehow still gets it right.

deals.details:
$5 Frozens
$6 Draft Beer & Wells
$8 Spicy Margaritas
$6 Select Wines
1/2 Off Appetizers

restaurants.name: Postino South Broadway
restaurants.image_alt: A fruit salad plated at Postino's.
restaurants.deal_headline: $6 Wine, $6 Beer Pitchers, Plus $25 Board-and-Bottle Nights
restaurants.blurb: $6 glasses of wine and $6 beer pitchers, Mon to Fri 11am to 5pm. Mon-Tue evenings stack on a $25 bruschetta board and bottle of wine. The Broadway wine bar with a 4.8 rating that solves the SA afternoon wine problem.

items: Same $6 wine and beer-pitcher menu through weekend brunch
$25 board of bruschetta plus bottle of wine

restaurants.name: El Honky Tonk
restaurants.image_alt: "Honky Tonk" neon sign illuminates a rustic bar with patrons in cowboy hats.
restaurants.deal_headline: $3.75 House Liquor & $4 Domestics, Six Days a Week
restaurants.blurb: $3.75 house liquor, $4 domestic beers, $5 imports, Mon to Sat 2 to 7pm at the N Flores honky tonk. Sundays open with $3 mimosas through the afternoon. Cowboy hats optional but encouraged.

deals.details:
$3.75 House Liquor
$4 Domestic Beers
$5 Imported Beers
$3 Mimosas

$3.75 House Liquor

$4.25 Imported Beers

restaurants.name: Burleson Yard Beer Garden
restaurants.image_alt: Platter of chicken wings, fries, and a chili-rimmed drink outdoors.
restaurants.deal_headline: $3.50 Wells & $6 Margaritas at the East Downtown Beer Garden
restaurants.blurb: $3.50 wells, $4.50 draft Dos XX/Michelob/Modelo, $6 margaritas, $5.50 Tecate Micheladas. Mon to Wed 2 to 7pm, Thu-Fri start at noon, Saturday opens at 11am. The Austin Street beer garden that doubles as the East Downtown headquarters.

items: $4.50 Dos XX, Michelob Ultra, Modelo drafts
Same happy hour menu, earlier start
Same happy hour menu through Saturday afternoon

restaurants.name: La Fonda On Main
restaurants.image_alt: Two garnished cocktails, red and white, on an outdoor mosaic table.
restaurants.blurb: $8 traditional and Flaca margaritas, $8 Hibiscus Mezcalero and Sotol Negroni, $8 Aztec Old-Fashioneds, $9 flavored margs. The Beacon Hill Mexican classic has been in business since 1932; the happy hour is how locals actually use it.

$8 Traditional, Flaca Margaritas

restaurants.name: Hanzo
restaurants.image_alt: Green cocktail with white foam and a fuchsia orchid garnish.
restaurants.deal_headline: $7 Cocktails & $3.50 Shots, Plus a Late-Night Reverse Happy Hour
restaurants.blurb: $7 cocktails (Punch Drunk Love, Spicy Pineapple Daiquiri), $7 wells and wine, $3.50 shots, Tue to Sat 5 to 7pm. Then a reverse happy hour runs 10pm to midnight same nights. The Alamo Heights Japanese spot with the longest cocktail program on Broadway.

items: $7 cocktails: Punch Drunk Love, Spicy Pineapple Daiquiri
$7 wells and wines by the glass
$3.50 shots: Spicy Pineapple Tequila, One Inch Punch, Black Flash
Same happy hour menu as a late-night reverse
Same happy hour menu runs all night Mondays and Sundays

restaurants.name: Cullum's Attagirl
restaurants.image_alt: Close-up: Seasoned split biscuit sandwich with sausage, egg, and cheese.
restaurants.deal_headline: $5 Wells, $7 Neon Frozen Margs & $5 Deviled Eggs, Wed-Fri
restaurants.blurb: $5 wells, $7 Neon Frozen Margaritas, $5 deviled eggs Wed to Fri 11am to 6pm at the Tobin Hill yard. Sundays run a late session: $3 Modelo, $3 Fernet, $5 wells, $4.50 fried bologna and pimento. As Tobin Hill as a happy hour gets.

deals.details:
